Brightwave · Product · Team

Backend Engineer

Brightwave · Remote (US) · Full-time

About the role

Brightwave builds the data platform that powers analytics for thousands of small businesses. We are hiring a Backend Engineer to own the services behind our reporting product — from the API layer down to the query engine — and to help shape how our small, senior team designs and ships reliable systems.

What you'll do

You will design, build, and operate the backend services that ingest, transform, and serve customer data at scale. You will own features end to end: schema design, API contracts, background processing, observability, and the on-call practices that keep them healthy. You will collaborate closely with frontend and product to turn ambiguous problems into dependable systems.

What we're looking for

We are looking for an engineer with several years of experience building production backend systems in a typed language, comfortable with relational databases, queues, and the tradeoffs of distributed systems. You write clear code, you test what matters, and you care about the operability of what you ship. Prior experience with data-intensive products is a strong plus.

Benefits

Competitive salary and meaningful equity, fully remote within the US, generous paid time off, home-office budget, and health, dental, and vision coverage. We keep meetings few and writing frequent, and we protect focus time for deep work.
